title: Trucking Business Formulates and Implements Privacy Policy
summary: The individual alleged his former employer, an interprovincial trucking company, disclosed his personal information to a creditor without his consent. The trucking company, a small, family-owned business, did not have formalized reporting or record-keeping processes in place upon first contact with this Office. Regardless, the investigati...
dedupKey: trucking business formulates and implements privacy policy|2004-06-24
